---
title: "Life"
format: html
---

I have a strong interest in nonprofit work and startups alike — I think the best innovations happen at the intersection of social impact and entrepreneurial thinking.

Last year, I participated in a **pitch competition**, which pushed me to think about ideas from a business and storytelling angle. More recently, I competed in a **datathon**, where I got to combine my love for data with solving real-world problems under pressure.

Outside of academics and competitions, I enjoy running, lifting, walks around campus, and a current painting project I've been slowly working on.

*(Photos coming soon!)*
